Article.ArticleTitle: Load-velocity profiles in machine-based exercises: comparing trained college students with recreationally active and sedentary middle-aged and older adults.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: School of Athletic Performance, Shanghai University of Sport, Shanghai, China.

Grant.Agency: Humanities and Social Sciences Research Program

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethics approval and consent to participate: This study was approved by the ethical committee of the Shanghai University of Sport (approval number: 102772024RT092). All participants provided written informed consent prior to participation. Consent for publication: Not applicable as no individual participant data are included in the manuscript. Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests.
